Come Play

Plan Your Visit

Now open in The Loop

The Flip is open 7 days a week in the heart of city. We're in the lower level of Block 37. That's also the pedway connection between the Washington Blue Line and Lake Red Line transit stops.

Location

108 N. State St., Suite 015, Chicago, IL 60602

Hours

Monday - Saturday10a - 8p
Sunday11a -6p
Private ToursBy appointment starting in July

“A Brief History of Fun” — a 90-minute play-oriented tour through pinball and its ancestor games, going all the way back to ancient Rome.

Pricing

Adult$20
Teen$15
Kid$10
Under 5Free

Seniors and Chicago residents get 20% off tickets. Tickets include all-day access to the museum and its exhibits and free play on all games in the museum area. If you want to just stop in for a quick game, we have 3 coin-operated games up front.

Contact

hello@theflip.museum

Also listed on PinballMap and the Pindigo app.

Stay in the Loop

Sign Up for Our Newsletter

Get updates on our progress, upcoming events, and be the first to know when we open.

No spam, ever. Unsubscribe anytime. See our privacy policy.

Chicago's Playable Pinball Museum. Connecting everyone with the history, art, science, and technology of pinball.
